description.en: Plan-view wall segments per UK drawing practice: brickwork, blockwork, cavity wall, timber/metal stud, fire-rated partitions (30/60 min).
description.nl: Wandsegmenten in plattegrond volgens Britse tekenpraktijk: brickwork, blockwork, spouwmuur, houten/metalen stijlwerk, brandwerende scheidingen (30/60 min).
